schema_source: grande_finale.tex Work-Plan paragraph 'Rung audit' + conj:Q (\label{conj:Q}); packet-extension for experimental/data/certificates/frontier-adjacent/kb_mca_v1.packet.json (adds the sibling key conjQ_rung_audit at a NEW path; kb_mca_v1.packet.json itself is NOT modified)
deliverable_name: conj:Q divisor-lattice rung audit at a0+1 (KB-MCA, v13 raw)

cross_refs.conj:Q: prefix flatness (grande_finale.tex \label{conj:Q}); THIS audit charges the quotient-pulled-back strata to their rungs, leaving conj:Q's primitive fiber as residual
cross_refs.conj:SP: primitive shift-pair control (\label{conj:SP}); not touched here
cross_refs.rem:proved-q-part: head-depth Q proved (1+o(1)); the open case is the deployed frontier depth
cross_refs.prop:mode-null-false: raw null fiber not extremal (route cut) -- here the null target (j=21) is absorbed by the s<=4 ladder, no separate null hypothesis needed

target.K_raw_note: floor(B* p^w / binom(n,m)); ambient integer multiplier cap for the safe-row Q-fin cell

divisor_lattice_note: n=2^21, so the divisor lattice of n is exactly the 2-adic tower 1|2|4|...|2^21 (j=0..21). Target stabilizer stratum j = v(z) = min_{i in I(z)} v2(i); nonzero strata j in {0..16}; j=17..20 EMPTY; j=21 all-zero. Subset-symmetry level s <= v2(m_safe)=4, so the ladder has 5 rungs s=0..4.

rungs.rung_verdict: RESIDUAL (this IS the primitive wall conj:Q; margin=0 by construction)
rungs.proof_obligation: OPEN (conj:Q at deployed depth w=67471; head-depth part PROVED, rem:proved-q-part)

rungs.rung_verdict: BELOW budget
rungs.proof_obligation: OPEN (L_1: max primitive-target fiber at quotient row (1048576,558024,33735) bounded by rho*avg with log2 rho <= 22.196861 = log2 K_raw -- the SAME flatness bar as the primitive row, at depth w/2^1; a REDUCTION in depth only. The row's standalone slack vs B* is informational, not the ladder threshold)

rungs.rung_verdict: BELOW budget

The row's standalone slack vs B* is informational, not the ladder threshold)

rungs.role: ABSORBED by rungs s<=4: every member has subset-symmetry s<=v2(m)=4, so this stratum's max fiber <= sum_{s=0}^{4} maxPi_s

conjQ_rung_audit.rounding_policy: Because the four nonprimitive-rung pessimistic shares (s=1..4) are exact rationals whose sum is not an integer, the AGGREGATE nonprimitive charge is rounded CONSERVATIVELY -- charge = ceil(sum_{s=1}^{4} share_s), never floor -- so the residual primitive budget quoted for conj:Q's core is never overstated; residual := K_raw - charge, and charge + residual == K_raw exactly by construction.

aggregate.verdict: GREEN: every divisor-lattice rung is BELOW the K_raw budget with printed margin; per grande_finale Rung-audit paragraph, the remaining work is genuinely PRIMITIVE (conj:Q at s=0, depth w=67471).

conjQ_rung_audit.reconciliation_with_laneC_derivation_scr: Lane C's own laneC_rung_audit.py truncates (Python int()) the summed nonprimitive share instead of rounding up, printing charge=35623/residual=4771897 (floor); this packet and its verifier adopt the strictly more conservative ceil pair charge=35624/residual=4771896 throughout (see rounding_policy above) -- a well-understood +/-1 bookkeeping choice on the AGGREGATE only, not a new arithmetic error: every per-rung share, the combined margin, and all 22 rung verdicts are identical either way.

reconciliation_with_periodic_floor_audit.object: packet kb_mca_v1.packet.json .rung_margin_audit (Audit 1, LOWER-side periodic FLOORS Gfloor/Gceil/Rem/Plant vs Theta)
reconciliation_with_periodic_floor_audit.its_verdict: GREEN (no periodic floor fires or is frontier-tight at a0+1; identity c=1 terminal at -22.1969 b)
reconciliation_with_periodic_floor_audit.relation: THIS audit is the complementary UPPER-side (conj:Q max-fiber) rung audit. The two are DISTINCT objects and must not be conflated: Audit 1 asks whether a periodic LOWER floor EXCEEDS Theta (refutation); this audit charges the quotient-pulled-back UPPER fibers to their rungs and reports K_raw consumption. Both are GREEN / BELOW.
reconciliation_with_periodic_floor_audit.no_refutation: No rung (either audit) exceeds budget; the adjacent conjecture is NOT falsified for a paid periodic reason; the edge does NOT move.

status: AUDIT (exact integer/rational arithmetic) for the descent identity and all margins; the per-rung max-fiber BOUNDS (L_1..L_4, conj:Q core) remain OPEN reductions.
